/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/game.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/game.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/menu/BottomMenu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/display/Display.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/engine/GameContext.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/menu/MenuBox.cpp.o -o game   -L/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu -lallegro_acodec -lallegro_audio -lallegro_color -lallegro_dialog -lallegro_image -lallegro_main -lallegro_memfile -lallegro_physfs -lallegro_primitives -lallegro_ttf -lallegro_font -lallegro
